commit_scope: Restore the full homepage story, repair English i18n leakage, and replace stock/TODO presence hero cards with source-grounded public assets already held by the web surface.

commands: cd web && npm test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: vitest)
for f in web/messages/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
curl local homepage HTML for leaked i18n keys, stock image URLs, and restored homepage section markers
playwright-cli open http://127.0.0.1:3114/ and full-page screenshot sanity check
cd web && npm test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts tests/homepage-readability.test.ts
local_validation.summary: The full homepage body is restored: invitation, featured concept/vision entry, idea form, how work grows, activity, silence/ground, and footer. The living-lineage presence cards remain as a lower supporting section using local/source-grounded assets for Liquid Bloom, Bloomurian, Mose, Matias De Stefano, and PORTAL. English messages were restored from the last full bundle after an earlier commit had truncated them to a homepage-only object, which caused header/live-breath keys to leak.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR checks, and merge verification.

deploy_validation.details: Public web verification will be performed after merge and deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The homepage should lead with what the network is creating and how to enter the work, not collapse into a presence-only page. Presence cards should use real local public assets and no stock/TODO placeholders.
test_flows: open local / -> no leaked common/header/nav/homeBreath/home living-lineage keys
open local / -> see What idea are you holding, Share an idea, Three days of silence, Living Lineage, and real presence names
open local / -> no images.unsplash.com and no TODO presence hero placeholders

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and public verification remain pending.
